title: Microcosm Work Ledger Author
triggers: A live coordination fact needs a Work Ledger record with session id, actor, scope, claim or heartbeat state, lease, read receipt, append evidence, and authority ceiling.
The agent can name the public-safe source refs, exact-copy body-floor boundary, claim scope, collision state, receipt refs, and forbidden live mutation claims without exporting private bodies.
workflow: Read std_microcosm_work_ledger, active Work Ledger claims, source-body import receipts, concurrency mission-control evidence, Task Ledger linkage, generated health, and relevant runtime views before authoring.

Admit only public-safe coordination records or exact-copy body-floor evidence; do not use this skill to mutate live claims, release claims, perform Git mutation, invoke providers, or claim private-data equivalence.
Regenerate the skill corpus and doctrine lattice, then run Work-Ledger-adjacent corpus checks, focused tests, broad projection checks, and scoped receipt binding.
